case_title: CHUNG JOHNNY DBA PACIFIC HEIGHTS SUITE VS GALINDO PHILIP G et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CHUNG JOHNNY DBA PACIFIC HEIGHTS SUITE AS TO DEFENDANT GALINDO PHILIP G FRANKO XAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG JOHNNY DBA PACIFIC HEIGHTS SUITE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALINDO PHILIP G FRANKO XAVIER $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,008.00, LIABILITY OF DEFT ISJOINT AND SEVERAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GALINDO PHILIP G HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-28-1991, GRANTED
